opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Premier Plumbing has no online booking, no contact form, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies in Boise go to competitors who offer instant booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing leads 24/7 without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; all contact is phone-only with no digital capture.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise customers is lost with zero follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call logging that captures caller details and auto-creates CRM contact records.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow Up
opportunities.signal: 231 reviews at 4.7 stars but no review-request patterns or loyalty signals detected on site.
opportunities.observation: Premier Plumbing earns strong satisfaction but leaves referrals and repeat jobs on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequences requesting Google reviews and offering seasonal maintenance reminders.
